ideation: This animation sequence will depict a chipmunk gathering nuts. The animation will focus on the use of both arms to mimic the action of collecting and holding nuts. Frame 1 will show both arms extended forward, palms up, as if reaching for nuts. Frame 2 will show both arms bending at the elbow to bring the nuts closer to the body. Frame 3 shows both arms raising to bring the nuts to the face, as if to eat them. Frame 4 depicts both arms bringing the nuts to the mouth.

frames.beat: arms reach forward, palms up, seeking nuts
arms bend, drawing the bounty closer
arms lift the treasures towards the face
nuts are brought to the mouth to be eaten
